title: Origins: Sun Block
description: This mod adds an enchantment available for helmets that allows you to not burn in daylight even if your origin has you take damage for being exposed to the sun
body: This mod adds an enchantment to the game called "Sun Block" that is exclusive to helmets. Upon wearing a helmet with the "Sun Block" enchantment, this mod will have `origins:exposed_to_sun` return false thus canceling out the sunlight damage you may encounter in most (all?) origins (both the Phantom origin shipped with Origins and the Vampire origin shipped with Origins: Vampire both have the `origins:exposed_to_sun` condition as one of the conditions that are required for the sunlight/burn damage to actually occur). This is just like Origins: Umbrella except rather than having an umbrella that prevents sun damage, you have a helmet with a custom enchantment that prevents sun damage, so it just adds some more... flexibility of how you can look without burning to death.
